title: frasera nitida var. albicaulis
intro: Frasera nitida var. albicaulis, commonly known as white root or mountain sage, is a perennial plant belonging to the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Frasera nitida var. albicaulis can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
